question: Do you remember the commander's name connected to the battle plan?
answer: I was in a medical unit where the head of the unit was a Kurdish lieutenant (a Kurdish captain) named Abdul. I had access to the plans, so he gave me a copy, plus an extra copy. That is how I took the extra copy to whoever needed it to repel the attack.
